title: astragalus capitis-regni
intro: Astragalus capitis-regni, also known as the Scorpion's Tail, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral compounds that can help to boost the immune system. The health benefits of Astragalus capitis-regni include reducing the risk of infections, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including capsules, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of fatigue and stress.
